economic_notes: Dakota Plains Wahpeton Oyate Economics Development Corporation excluded from consolidation; recorded at cost of $100. First Nation is contingently liable as co-borrower on a demand loan with Bridging Finance Inc. originally $5,555,000, with balance of $10,207,930 as of August 21, 2023 in payment default.
notes: Audit disclaimer of opinion issued due to significant weaknesses in internal controls across cash, accounts receivable, investments, tangible capital assets, accounts payable, payroll, revenue and expenditures. OSR is negative because deferred revenue adjustments and eliminations create large negative 'other revenue' offsets against gross government transfers. Four entities consolidated: Government, Post Secondary, CMHC Housing Authority, Health Authority. Dakota Plains Wahpeton Oyate Economics Development Corporation excluded from consolidation and recorded at cost of $100. Contingent liability exists as co-borrower on defaulted Bridging Finance Inc. loan with balance of $10,207,930 as of August 2023. Third-party management holds majority of cash ($4,688,080 of $4,801,545). No schedule of remuneration provided.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
High ISC dependency (107.21%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
